nasb.text: The oracle of him who hears the words of God, Who sees the vision of the Almighty, Falling down, yet having his eyes uncovered,

esv.text: the oracle of him who hears the words of God, who sees the vision of the Almighty, falling down with his eyes uncovered:

cnv.text: 得聽　神的話語、 得見全能者的異象、 身體仆倒而眼目睜開的人說：

ccb.text: 他得听上帝之言， 俯伏在地， 得见全能者的异象。
